name: elifecleaner

metadata.name: elifecleaner
metadata.summary: Clean and transform article submission files into a consistent format.

documentation:
# elife-cleaner

Clean and transform article submission files into a consistent format

## Requirements

Install `imagemagick-dev` and `ghostscript` in order for `wand` Python module to open PDF files. Also, the imagemagick `policy.xml` file must be configured to allow reading of PDF files.

## Configuration

To use a YAML file of assessment terms in the `asessment_terms.py` module, set the constant `ASSESSMENT_TERMS_YAML` in the module to be the path to the YAML file on disk. The sample file `assessment_terms.yaml` in the code repository is not distributed as part of the library.

## License

Licensed under [MIT](https://opensource.org/licenses/mit-license.php).

functions.name: elifecleaner.video.video_file_list
documentation: - raise exception when ignore term is found, or when video term is not found, to distinguish between them
- enhance regex to handle mixed numeric values like 6A

functions.name: elifecleaner.zip_lib.profile_zip
documentation: open the zip and get relevant file names

functions.name: elifecleaner.parse.find_missing_files_by_name
documentation:
In the manifest file names look for any missing from the expected numeric sequence
For example, if there is only Figure 1 and Figure 3, Figure 2 is consider to be missing

functions.name: elifecleaner.parse.find_missing_value_by_sequence
documentation:
from list of values, use match pattern to collect a numeric sequence and check for
numbers missing from the sequence
For example, match_pattern of r"Figure (\d+)" to get a list of 1, 2, 3, n
(note: two backslashes are used for one backslash in the above example
 to avoid DeprecationWarning: invalid escape sequence in this comment)

functions.name: elifecleaner.parse.article_xml_asset
documentation:
find the article XML file name,
e.g. 30-01-2019-RA-eLife-45644/30-01-2019-RA-eLife-45644.xml
